health_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Sensitive health data such as physiological conditions and medical device data is collected and shared with third parties including research partners and service providers. Data is transferred internationally to the US, and retention periods are vaguely defined as 'as long as necessary'.

physiological_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physiological data such as health conditions and heart rate data is collected and may be shared with third parties like service providers and marketing partners. collected.policy_snippet: This includes your name, email address, general location information (country/zip code), profile image or photo (if you choose to provide one), username and password, date of birth, and sex.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements)
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the policy including service provision and legal requirements

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal shares your information with service providers, business partners, and other third parties to provide you with our Services.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data including body measurements, photos, and location are collected and shared with third parties including marketing and advertising partners. International transfers may occur to countries with different privacy protections. No automatic deletion based on inactivity is specified, and deletion requires user request.

shared.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal shares your information with service providers, business partners, and other third parties to provide you with our Services. We also share your information with marketing and advertising partners to show you relevant content and advertising.
shared.purpose: To show you relevant content and advertising and optimize advertising campaigns.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data including app usage, habits, and clicks is collected and shared with advertising partners. Retention periods are vague, and data may be transferred internationally.
